caption: A close-up shot of a tiger's face is shown, with the animal's mouth open in a roar or snarl, revealing its teeth and tongue. The background is a soft, out-of-focus blend of greens and brown, suggesting a natural outdoor setting. Superimposed over the tiger is bright yellow and white text. Large yellow text displays "$1 /YEAR" with the "/YEAR" written in a smaller font. Below this, bold white text reads "WHEN YOU JOIN". As the sequence progresses, the tiger's expression shifts slightly, with its mouth opening wider and its facial muscles tightening, while the on-screen text remains stationary and unchanged. The lighting is natural, highlighting the orange, black, and white patterns of the tiger's fur.
